case.title: LACHMAN v. CITY OF MIAMI BEACH

opinion.h: LACHMAN v. CITY OF MIAMI BEACH , 348 U.S. 906 (1955)
Ralph LACHMAN et al., appellants, v. CITY OF MIAMI BEACH. No. 408.
Supreme Court of the United States
Messrs. John M. Murrell and Raymond L. Wise, for appellants.
Mr. Thomas H. Anderson, for appellee.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for the want of a substantial federal question.
